exceptions.reason: The search input carries no role attribute at all -- no role="combobox" is ever authored. Angular's arena-command-palette is the accessible reference; this is a real defect, not idiom.
No aria-expanded is set anywhere, on the input or on any trigger. Converging on Angular's implementation.
No aria-controls references the results list; the input and the list of filtered commands are not associated for assistive tech at all. Converging on Angular's implementation.

The highlighted row is tracked only in component state (the `i` index) and shown purely with a background-color change; there is no aria-activedescendant, so a screen reader user gets no indication of which command is active while arrowing through the list. Converging on Angular's implementation.
